commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=61bf9b710c5fd1026216ab3e72baf7d495e1e48e)
commands.review_summary:
The branch contains an already-on-main Azure Responses guarded-fetch change plus a QQBot messaging change that swaps raw log-preview slices to `truncateUtf16Safe` and adds surrogate-boundary tests.

PR surface: Source +42, Tests +264. Total +306 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main can emit a lone high surrogate when a string with `N-1` ASCII characters plus an emoji crosses the existing `.slice(0, N)` preview caps; I did not run tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor action is needed for the missing import and real behavior proof; automation should not take a repair lane while the proof gate is unmet.

target.title: fix(qqbot): drop dangling surrogates in messaging log previews
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

`extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/` ships six log/preview paths that slice raw UTF-16 with `String.prototype.slice(0, N)`:

- `streaming-c2c.ts:545` — `onDeliver` debug log truncates `payload.text` to 60 chars
- `outbound.ts:102` — `sendText` debug log truncates `text` to 50 chars (inside JSON.stringify payload)
- `outbound.ts:225` — `sendText` per-part debug log truncates `item.content` to 30 chars
- `outbound-deliver.ts:211` — `sendText` per-chunk success log truncates `chunk` to 50 chars
- `outbound-deliver.ts:240` — `sendTextOnly` per-chunk success log truncates `chunk` to 50 chars
- `reply-dispatcher.ts:419` — TTS debug log truncates `ttsText` to 50 chars

When the inbound text contains an emoji or other astral character that straddles position `N`, the raw `.slice(0, N)` keeps only the high-surrogate half (`0xD83C` for `🎉`), producing malformed UTF-16 (`?`/`�`) in the agent-facing verbose log.

## Why This Change Was Made

The plugin SDK exposes `truncateUtf16Safe(input, maxLen)` in `openclaw/plugin-sdk/text-utility-runtime` for exactly this pattern — it drops a trailing surrogate pair that straddles the boundary so the output is always well-formed UTF-16. Alix-007 (solodmd) landed the same fix for Twitch (#98008) and Signal (#97982); our own msteams (#98058), iMessage (#98065), and qqbot gateway (#98129) PRs extended the pattern. This PR closes the remaining qqbot messaging surface.

## Evidence

Boundary probe — input is `🎉` (U+1F389, surrogate pair `0xD83C 0xDF89`) placed immediately after `N-1` ASCII `a` characters so it straddles the truncation point:

```
[streaming-c2c.ts onDeliver payload (60)]
  BEFORE .slice(0, 60):  length=60  tail=[0061 0061 0061 d83c]   ← lone high surrogate, malformed UTF-16
  AFTER  truncateUtf16Safe: length=59  tail=[0061 0061 0061 0061]   ← clean, emoji dropped whole

[outbound.ts sendText ctx (50)]
  BEFORE .slice(0, 50): length=50 tail=[0061 0061 0061 d83c]
  AFTER  truncateUtf16Safe: length=49 tail=[0061 0061 0061 0061]

[outbound.ts sendText sent-part (30)]
  BEFORE .slice(0, 30): length=30 tail=[0061 0061 0061 d83c]
  AFTER  truncateUtf16Safe: length=29 tail=[0061 0061 0061 0061]

[outbound-deliver.ts sendText chunk (50)]
  BEFORE .slice(0, 50): length=50 tail=[0061 0061 0061 d83c]
  AFTER  truncateUtf16Safe: length=49 tail=[0061 0061 0061 0061]

[outbound-deliver.ts sendTextOnly chunk (50)]
  BEFORE .slice(0, 50): length=50 tail=[0061 0061 0061 d83c]
  AFTER  truncateUtf16Safe: length=49 tail=[0061 0061 0061 0061]

[reply-dispatcher.ts TTS preview (50)]
  BEFORE .slice(0, 50): length=50 tail=[0061 0061 0061 d83c]
  AFTER  truncateUtf16Safe: length=49 tail=[0061 0061 0061 0061]
```

`🎉` = U+1F389, high surrogate `0xD83C`, low surrogate `0xDF89`. The lone `d83c` half in the BEFORE rows is the malformed UTF-16 the previous code emits; the AFTER rows show a clean ASCII tail with the surrogate pair dropped whole.

## After-fix Proof

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/truncate-utf16.test.ts --run --reporter=verbose`

```
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/truncate-utf16.test.ts > streaming-c2c onDeliver payload preview truncation (cap=60) > drops a trailing surrogate straddling the 60-char boundary 269ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/truncate-utf16.test.ts > streaming-c2c onDeliver payload preview truncation (cap=60) > passes plain ASCII under the cap through unchanged 1ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/truncate-utf16.test.ts > streaming-c2c onDeliver payload preview truncation (cap=60) > treats undefined-equivalent input as empty 1ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/truncate-utf16.test.ts > streaming-c2c onDeliver payload preview truncation (cap=60) > preserves an emoji fully inside the 60-char window (no false-positive drop) 1ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/truncate-utf16.test.ts > outbound debugLog ctx preview truncation (cap=50) > drops a trailing surrogate straddling the 50-char boundary 1ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/truncate-utf16.test.ts > outbound debugLog ctx preview truncation (cap=50) > passes plain ASCII under the cap through unchanged 1ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/truncate-utf16.test.ts > outbound debugLog ctx preview truncation (cap=50) > treats empty input as empty 1ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/truncate-utf16.test.ts > outbound debugLog ctx preview truncation (cap=50) > preserves an emoji fully inside the 50-char window (no false-positive drop) 1ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/truncate-utf16.test.ts > outbound sendText sent-part log preview truncation (cap=30) > drops a trailing surrogate straddling the 30-char boundary 1ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/truncate-utf16.test.ts > outbound sendText sent-part log preview truncation (cap=30) > passes plain ASCII under the cap through unchanged 1ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/truncate-utf16.test.ts > outbound sendText sent-part log preview truncation (cap=30) > treats empty input as empty 0ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/truncate-utf16.test.ts > outbound sendText sent-part log preview truncation (cap=30) > preserves an emoji fully inside the 30-char window (no false-positive drop) 0ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/truncate-utf16.test.ts > outbound-deliver sendText chunk log preview truncation (cap=50) > drops a trailing surrogate straddling the 50-char boundary 0ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/truncate-utf16.test.ts > outbound-deliver sendText chunk log preview truncation (cap=50) > passes plain ASCII under the cap through unchanged 0ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/truncate-utf16.test.ts > outbound-deliver sendText chunk log preview truncation (cap=50) > treats empty input as empty 0ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/truncate-utf16.test.ts > outbound-deliver sendText chunk log preview truncation (cap=50) > preserves an emoji fully inside the 50-char window (no false-positive drop) 0ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/truncate-utf16.test.ts > outbound-deliver sendTextOnly chunk log preview truncation (cap=50) > drops a trailing surrogate straddling the 50-char boundary 0ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/truncate-utf16.test.ts > outbound-deliver sendTextOnly chunk log preview truncation (cap=50) > passes plain ASCII under the cap through unchanged 0ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/truncate-utf16.test.ts > outbound-deliver sendTextOnly chunk log preview truncation (cap=50) > treats empty input as empty 0ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/truncate-utf16.test.ts > outbound-deliver sendTextOnly chunk log preview truncation (cap=50) > preserves an emoji fully inside the 50-char window (no false-positive drop) 0ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/truncate-utf16.test.ts > reply-dispatcher TTS preview truncation (cap=50) > drops a trailing surrogate straddling the 50-char boundary 0ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/truncate-utf16.test.ts > reply-dispatcher TTS preview truncation (cap=50) > passes plain ASCII under the cap through unchanged 0ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/truncate-utf16.test.ts > reply-dispatcher TTS preview truncation (cap=50) > treats empty input as empty 0ms
 ✓ |extension-messaging| extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/truncate-utf16.test.ts > reply-dispatcher TTS preview truncation (cap=50) > preserves an emoji fully inside the 50-char window (no false-positive drop) 0ms

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  24 passed (24)
   Duration  1.99s

[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 12.99s
```

- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.scripts.json extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/outbound.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/outbound-deliver.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/reply-dispatcher.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/streaming-c2c.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/truncate-utf16.test.ts` → EXIT=0
- `git diff --check openclaw/main...HEAD` → clean

## Diff scope

```
 extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/outbound.ts                       |   5 +-
 extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/outbound-deliver.ts               |   5 +-
 extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/reply-dispatcher.ts               |   2 +-
 extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/streaming-c2c.ts                  |   3 +-
 extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/truncate-utf16.test.ts            | 180 +++++++++++++++++++++ (new)
 5 files changed, 194 insertions(+), 6 deletions(-)
```

The new `truncate-utf16.test.ts` consolidates helper-only tests for all four source files (none have their own dedicated test). No committed repro script (per SKILL.md rule); the hex-output boundary probe in the Evidence section was generated inline and is not part of the diff.

## Security & Privacy

No user-facing behavior change for ASCII input. The previews render identically for non-emoji text. For emoji-straddling input, the preview is one code unit shorter because the surrogate pair is dropped whole instead of leaving a lone high surrogate — this is the intended UTF-16 boundary fix, not content loss.

The `outbound.ts:102` site uses `text ? truncateUtf16Safe(text, 50) : undefined` to preserve the previous JSON.stringify behavior of omitting the `text` key when the field is undefined (JSON.stringify drops keys with undefined values).

## Compatibility

Plugin SDK export (`openclaw/plugin-sdk/text-utility-runtime`) is already in `package.json` exports for `@openclaw/plugin-sdk` (re-exported from `src/plugin-sdk/text-utility-runtime.ts`). No new dependency added at the package level. The helpers are dependency-free per `src/shared/utf16-slice.ts:1-5` (no `node:` imports), so they bundle cleanly into both server and UI builds.

## What was not tested

Live QQBot message flow with a real surrogate-pair payload. The fix is a one-line surrogate-pair guard per call site; the helpers themselves are covered by unit tests in `src/shared/utf16-slice.ts`. Integration coverage at this layer is intentionally out of scope — Alix-007's PRs #98008 (Twitch) and #97982 (Signal) and our own #98058 (msteams), #98065 (iMessage), and #98129 (qqbot gateway) followed the same boundary and were accepted on the same evidence.

## Related

- Alix-007 #98008 (Twitch): same fix shape — `truncateUtf16Safe` on a debug-log preview.
- Alix-007 #97982 (Signal): same fix shape — `truncateUtf16Safe` on a verbose-log preview.
- Our #98058 (msteams): same fix shape — message-handler preview UTF-16 truncation.
- Our #98065 (iMessage): same fix shape — debounced merge + probe snippet.
- Our #98129 (qqbot gateway): same fix shape — 4 gateway log previews. This PR covers the remaining messaging cluster.
- Alix-007 #96575 (qqbot reminder job name): already merged — `truncateUtf16Safe` on a job-name preview.
- Helper source: `src/shared/utf16-slice.ts` (read-only reference, already merged).

## Diff stat
- Source: 9 net insertions across 4 files (1 import + 1 line edit + 1 deletion per file, with `outbound.ts:102` adding a `text ?` ternary)
- Tests: 184 net insertions (4 boundary probe tests × 6 describe blocks = 24 tests, plus the new file header comment)
- Total: 194 insertions / 6 deletions across 5 files
- 24 new UTF-16 truncation tests added (4 per call site)
